steps.title: Set up the mass range
steps.content: The panda's mass $p$ is between $\frac{1}{950}$ and $\frac{1}{850}$ of the mother's $95{,}950$ grams: $$\frac{95{,}950}{950} \le p \le \frac{95{,}950}{850}.$$

steps.title: Match the lower bound
steps.content:
The answer choices show only a lower bound; we need $101 \le p$.
  • A) $10.1 \le p$ — off by a factor of 10.
  • B) $101 \le p$ — matches the computed lower bound exactly.
  • C) $1{,}010 \le p$ — off by a factor of 10.
  • D) $10{,}100 \le p$ — far too large.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
